value.found_quote: Subagentes são assistentes de IA especializados que lidam com tipos específicos de tarefas. Use um quando uma tarefa secundária inundaria sua conversa principal com resultados de pesquisa, logs ou conteúdos de arquivo que você não referenciará novamente
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's Claude Code documentation page titled "Criar subagentes personalizados" (Create custom subagents). It extensively describes Claude Code subagents — specialized AI assistants that handle specific task types, run in their own context window, and can be configured for multi-step orchestration. The claim that Anthropic offers Claude Code subagents is directly substantiated. The page describes them as currently available features (e.g., creating via /agents, built-in subagents like Explore, Plan, general-purpose), indicating active status. Note: the claim's parenthetical mentions third-party orchestrators like "Gas Town" and "Multiclaude," which are not on this page, but the core offering — Claude Code subagents — is fully described.
